title: The next Big Five Inventory (BFI-2): Developing and assessing a hierarchical model with 15 facets
authors_or_org: Christopher J. Soto; Oliver P. John

title: The Big Five Inventory-2 (BFI-2)
authors_or_org: Colby College Personality Lab / Christopher J. Soto
claim_supported: BFI-2 documentation identifies five domains and 15 facet traits.

title: Between facets and domains: 10 aspects of the Big Five
authors_or_org: Colin G. DeYoung; Lena C. Quilty; Jordan B. Peterson
claim_supported: Openness/Intellect can be separated into related aspects between broad domain and narrow facets.
how_used: Supports openness/intellect distinction without treating openness as intelligence.

title: International Personality Item Pool Home

how_used: Supports measurement ecosystem boundary, not item reuse.

title: Openness/Intellect: A Dimension of Personality Reflecting Cognitive Exploration
